title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — EMEA — Q2 2026
summary: Twenty-one European Union members are simultaneously implementing MiCA Level 2 technical standards while AMLA becomes operational with direct supervision authority over highest-risk crypto firms. UK regulators are setting hard authorization deadlines as the FCA consultation on final conduct rules closes in June, and Middle East jurisdictions from UAE to Saudi Arabia are finalizing licensing frameworks. This represents the largest regulatory infrastructure buildout since 5AMLD—and compliance wind
